item.title: White Shark Fled Orca — Now It's Back | Shark Science
item.description:
Great white sharks vanished from South Africa's most famous waters — driven out by two orcas named Port and Starboard. Scientists watched in disbelief as the ocean's most feared predator fled. Now... they're coming back. But the shallows have changed. And so have the rules.
In this episode of Shark Science, we break down the real story behind one of the most dramatic predator displacement events ever recorded — and what the great white shark's return means for the entire ocean ecosystem.
🦈 What you'll discover: → How two orcas drove great whites from Gansbaai & False Bay → Why great white sharks fear killer whales more than anything else → The "liver extraction" hunting technique that changed shark science → What happened to seal populations, penguins & the food chain → Whether great white sharks are truly returning — or just passing through → The real threat behind the disappearance (it's not just orcas) → What Port and Starboard are doing right now
This is not just predator vs predator. This is apex predator behavior, ocean ecosystem collapse, and shark science you've never seen explained like this.
🔔 Subscribe to Shark Science for weekly deep dives into the most dangerous, misunderstood, and fascinating creatures in the ocean.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ⏱️ TIMESTAMPS ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 0:00 — The Great White Shark Is Back 0:45 — Why They Fled: Port & Starboard Explained 2:30 — The Liver Extraction: How Orcas Hunt Great Whites 4:15 — Great White Shark Behavior Under Fear 5:40 — What Happened to South Africa's Ocean After They Left 7:20 — Are Great White Sharks Actually Returning? 9:00 — The Real Reason They Disappeared (Beyond Orcas) 10:45 — What This Means for Shark Science & Conservation 12:00 — Who Really Controls the Ocean?
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 🔗 WATCH NEXT ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ▶ White Sharks Are Not the Apex Predators | Nature Documentary (https://youtu.be/7k5HB2LQVBA) ▶ Ocean's Deadliest Predator Revealed (Not Sharks!) https://youtu.be/H6VT48-jky8 ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 📌 SOURCES & SCIENCE ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ - Towner et al. (2022) — African Journal of Marine Science - Towner et al. (2024) — Orca solo predation on great white sharks - Frontiers in Marine Science (2025) — Orca predation & ecosystem impact - Hammerschlag et al. (2025) — Cascading ecosystem effects, False Bay - Dyer Island Conservation Trust — Long-term white shark data
#SharkScience #GreatWhiteShark #OrcaVsShark #KillerWhale #SharkWeek #ApexPredator #OceanScience #MarineBiology #PortAndStarboard #SharkAttack
